title: Brazilian Casserole with Sour Cookie Crust
description: A twist on traditional casserole recipes, this Brazilian-inspired dish combines the flavors of Brazil with a tangy sour cookie crust.

ingredients.name: canned black beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together cookie crumbs and sour cream until well combined.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a large skillet, heat the Brazilian-style spices over medium heat.
Add the black beans, diced tomatoes, and grated cheese. Stir until the cheese is melted.
Pour the bean mixture over the cookie crust.
Bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is bubbly and the crust is golden brown.
Let the casserole cool for 10 minutes before serving.
